zh.lifeSummary: 當William Webber於1567年出生在英國戴文比德福德時，他的父親William Webber20歲，母親Jane Ruth Rossiter16歲。他於1601年9月18日與Johan Wynslade在英國英格蘭戴文比德福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1670年在他的家鄉享年103歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Webber于1567年出生在英国戴文比德福德时，他的父亲William Webber20岁，母亲Jane Ruth Rossiter16岁。他于1601年9月18日与Johan Wynslade在英国英格兰戴文比德福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1670年在他的家乡享年103岁。

nameMeanings.name: Webber
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webber, an agent derivative of Webb .
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weber   ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Webb
meanings: English: occupational name for a weaver, from early Middle English webbe (Old English webba (masculine) or webbe (feminine), probably used of both male and female weavers). This word survived into Middle English long enough to give rise to the surname, but was already obsolescent as an agent noun; hence the secondary forms with the agent suffixes -er and -ster (see Webster , Webber and compare Weaver ).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, cognates of 1, including Weber and Weberman.
History: Richard Webb, a Lowland Scot, was an admitted freeman of Boston in 1632, and in 1635 was one of the first settlers of Hartford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When William Webber was born in 1567, in Bideford, Devon, England, his father, William Webber, was 20 and his mother, Jane Ruth Rossiter, was 16. He married Johan Wynslade on 18 September 1601, in Bideford, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1670, in his hometown, at the age of 103.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Webber est né en 1567, à Bideford, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Webber, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Jane Ruth Rossiter, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Johan Wynslade le 18 septembre 1601, à Bideford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1670, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 103 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Webber 1567 in Bideford, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Webber 20 und seine Mutter Jane Ruth Rossiter 16. Er hat am 18. September 1601 in Bideford, Devon, England, United Kingdom Johan Wynslade geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1670 im Alter von 103 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Webber è nato il nel 1567 nel Bideford, Devon, England, il suo padre, William Webber, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Jane Ruth Rossiter, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Johan Wynslade il 18 settembre 1601, nel Bideford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1670, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 103 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Webberが1567年にイギリスデボンビデフォードで生まれた時，父William Webberは20歳，母Jane Ruth Rossiterは16歳であった。1601年9月18日にイギリスイギリスデボンビデフォードでJohan Wynsladeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1670年に故郷で103歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Webber(이)가 1567년 영국 데폰 비데퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Webber(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Ruth Rossiter(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1601년 9월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 비데퍼드에서 Johan Wynslade(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1670년 그의 고향에서 103세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Webber nasceu em 1567, em Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Webber, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Jane Ruth Rossiter, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Johan Wynslade em 18 de setembro de 1601, em Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1670, em sua cidade natal, com 103 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Webber родился в 1567 г. в местности бидефорд, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени William Webber было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Ruth Rossiter, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Johan Wynslade 18 сентября 1601 г. в местности бидефорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1670 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 103 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Webber nació en 1567, en Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, William Webber, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Jane Ruth Rossiter, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Johan Wynslade el 18 de septiembre de 1601, en Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1670, en su pueblo, a la edad de 103 años.
